directions_tried.name: Phase 0: Framework Verification
directions_tried.outcome: Beta is De Giorgi recurrence exponent. Single bottleneck: P_k^{21}. Phase 0 gate PASSED.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Empirical beta measurement (DNS)
directions_tried.outcome: All beta_eff < 4/3. ABC Beltrami outlier: beta ~1.0. Branch: Path B.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Tran-Yu Galilean invariance
directions_tried.outcome: Grade C: Not applicable. Pressure Galilean-invariant.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1: CZ slack on De Giorgi decomposition
directions_tried.outcome: NEGATIVE: CZ slack k-independent. P_k^{21} tighter than full pressure.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1b: Post-2007 De Giorgi landscape
directions_tried.outcome: Beta 4/3 UNTOUCHED since 2007. Community moved orthogonally.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1b: Beltrami conditional regularity
directions_tried.outcome: Grade B: Mechanism identified (Lamb=0 -> CZ loss=0). Continuous in eps.

directions_tried.name: Phase 1c: Beltrami deficit computation
directions_tried.outcome: B_k = O(2^{-k}) for exact Beltrami. Pressure >95% Bernoulli at k>=4.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Adversarial Review
directions_tried.outcome: 3 novel claims. Weakest: Claim 5. Strategy-002: rigorous Lamb-vector bound.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2b: Near-Beltrami test
directions_tried.outcome: Mechanism does NOT generalize. B_k decay lost for any eps > 0. Beta > 1 requires >98% Beltrami.

explorations_completed.key_finding: Beta is recurrence exponent. Bottleneck: P_k^{21}.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Measure empirical beta (5 ICs x 3-4 Re)
CZ tightness for De Giorgi pressure pieces
Beltrami deficit of u_below + pressure decomposition
explorations_completed.key_finding: B_k = O(2^{-k}) for ABC. Pressure >95% Bernoulli.
